name: project-discovery
description: Interrogate product ideas, inspect existing projects, and turn discoveries into concrete plans and documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Turn project questions into plans and documentation
interface.longDescription: Use structured interviews to eliminate ambiguity before implementation, produce complementary inside-out and outside-in plans, inspect an existing codebase, and create a comprehensive evidence-based README.
defaultPrompt: Interrogate this idea before we plan its implementation.
Interview me about this project and write its README.
